selections.name: Altiplano
selections.reason: Placed nicely in recent starts, including a solid 2nd at this track and distance. Top pick.

selections.name: Kenwood House
selections.reason: Consistent form with a recent 4th at Te Rapa. Can bounce back here.

selections.name: El Speedy Man
selections.reason: Good debut run finishing 2nd at this track. Improvement expected.

selections.name: In Your Dreams
selections.reason: Drawn well in barrier 1, recent 3rd at this track shows she is ready to peak.

danger_horse.name: Realta Forsai
danger_horse.reason: Improver who looks ideally placed from a better draw.

selections.name: Spanish Lad
selections.reason: Won well at this track and distance last start. Looks to have the measure of this field.

selections.name: Delz Abeel
selections.reason: Made significant ground to finish 2nd behind Spanish Lad last start. Big threat.

selections.name: Lerado
selections.reason: Solid 3rd behind the top two picks last start. Hard to beat on that effort.

selections.name: What A Yarn
selections.reason: Resuming but has good first-up form. Can feature prominently.

danger_horse.name: Vivace
danger_horse.reason: Won nicely second-up at this track. Fitter and is a leading player.

selections.name: Dink
selections.reason: Racing well recently with a solid 2nd at Hawera. Drawn perfectly in barrier 1.

selections.name: All Too Bold
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Trialled well and anticipating a strong return.

selections.name: La Cadiere
selections.reason: Solid 5th at Pukekohe last start. Racing well and is a major player.

selections.name: Fat Albert
selections.reason: Good 4th at this track last start. Worth following up despite the wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Buccino
danger_horse.reason: Led to the turn before fading last start. Major player if she can sustain the run.

selections.name: Lhasa
selections.reason: Class runner of the field dropping in grade. Has won first-up previously. Expected to play a major role.

selections.name: Colonel Warden
selections.reason: Not far away last time out at this track. Should run well.

selections.name: Domain Ace
selections.reason: Well placed here and can improve enough to take this out.

selections.name: Kasukedo
selections.reason: Solid 4th at this track last start. Will benefit from that run and is definitely worth including.

danger_horse.name: Cheap Sav
danger_horse.reason: Rates highly and expected to do much better with that run under her belt.

selections.name: Estilo
selections.reason: Made ground from midfield for a strong 2nd at this track last start. Sure to run well.

selections.name: Batu
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Good debut run at this track previously. Bright return expected.

selections.name: Impressive Belle
selections.reason: Racing first-up. Drawn well and everything points to an effective return.

selections.name: Jack High
selections.reason: On debut. Pay to keep an eye on betting moves after a recent trial.

danger_horse.name: Smashing Sister
danger_horse.reason: Must be respected on best form despite fading last start.

selections.name: Brazen Affair
selections.reason: Can turn form around in this suitable contest. Solid record.

selections.name: Karyon
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. Held ground well for 2nd at this track last start. Worth plenty of thought.

selections.name: Lady Iris
selections.reason: Better than recent moderate performance suggests. Can bounce back.

selections.name: Catoca
selections.reason: Fitter now and is a leading contender after a solid 3rd here last start.

danger_horse.name: Perfect Dividends
danger_horse.reason: Looking to others but has ability on his day.

selections.name: Skymax
selections.reason: Scored a big win at this track and distance last start. Confidence is back.

selections.name: Prometheus
selections.reason: Good effort last start finishing 2nd behind Skymax. Can build on that performance.

selections.name: Lovaci
selections.reason: Definite winning chance. Sure to be thereabouts after a solid 4th last time.

selections.name: Naughty Grannie
selections.reason: Scored a big win at this track last start. Bold showing expected again.

danger_horse.name: Opera Belle
danger_horse.reason: Rates well in this lineup and worth including.

selections.name: Unodostrescuatro
selections.reason: Sat on the speed and boxed on steadily for 4th at this track last start. Looks hard to beat.

selections.name: Arkadus
selections.reason: Key runner in this field. Eased back early last start but can feature here.

selections.name: Nature's Beauty
selections.reason: Nicely placed and is among the leading hopes after a solid 4th at this track.

selections.name: Erase
selections.reason: Tried to lead throughout last start. Can expect a fair run from the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Allthekingshorses
danger_horse.reason: Not a great draw again but represents a major threat.
